underlying_goal: Develop and iteratively refine a GitLab pipeline status checking skill that uses MCP tools, includes knowledge base integration for root cause analysis, and respects execution restrictions
friction_detail: Claude used Bash/curl for KB fetching despite the skill explicitly forbidding shell commands in readonly mode, and initially tried WebFetch which failed due to HTTPS upgrade on internal URLs.
brief_summary: User iteratively built and refined a GitLab pipeline status skill to use MCP tools with knowledge base integration, mostly succeeded but Claude violated its own no-bash restriction when fetching KB content.
